name: Pall HF Series High-Pressure Hydraulic Filter
description: The Pall HF Series high-pressure hydraulic filter removes particulate contamination from hydraulic systems up to 420 bar. This 400 L/min filter with 10 micron absolute media protects sensitive servo and proportional valves.
shortDescription: High-pressure hydraulic filter, 400 L/min, 10 micron, 420 bar.
technicalDescription: High-pressure inline hydraulic filter with duplex design for continuous operation. 10 micron absolute (ß10 ≥ 200) Micro-Fiberglass media. 420 bar working pressure with bypass valve and clogging indicator.
features: Duplex design allows element change without system shutdown
material: Steel Head and Bowl, Fiberglass Media
seoTitle: Pall HF Series High-Pressure Hydraulic Filter
seoDescription: Pall HF-400 hydraulic filter, 400 L/min, 10 micron, 420 bar. Duplex design for continuous operation. Protects servo valves and hydraulic components.

faq.question: What is the filter media composition?
faq.answer: Multi-layer micro-fiberglass media with stainless steel wire mesh support layers.

faq.question: How often should the element be changed?
faq.answer: When clogging indicator reaches red zone (typically 1-2 bar dp depending on system). Typical element life is 6-12 months.

faq.question: What Beta ratio does this filter achieve?

name: Donaldson P521089 Air Filter Element
description: The Donaldson P521089 PowerCore air filter element provides high-efficiency air filtration for heavy-duty engine intakes and industrial compressors. With PowerCore media technology, it delivers superior dust holding capacity in a compact package.
shortDescription: PowerCore air filter element, heavy-duty, dust holding, compact design.
technicalDescription: Ultra-Web fine fiber media with PowerCore pleat geometry. High dust-holding capacity with low restriction. Synthetic media with 99.99% filtration efficiency at 1 micron. Designed for off-highway and industrial applications.
features: PowerCore pleat geometry for higher capacity
Ultra-Web fine fiber media for high efficiency
High dust holding capacity extends service life
benefits: Up to 2x longer service life vs conventional filters
Protects engines from abrasive dust particles
Reduces fuel consumption with lower restriction
seoTitle: Donaldson P521089 PowerCore Air Filter Element
seoDescription: Donaldson P521089 PowerCore air filter with Ultra-Web media, 99.99% efficiency. For heavy-duty engine intakes and industrial compressors.

faq.question: What is PowerCore technology?
faq.answer: PowerCore uses formed pleats in a unique geometry that provides 2x the media area in the same size package for longer life.

faq.question: Can this be cleaned and reused?
faq.answer: No, this is a disposable filter element. Attempting to clean it may damage the media.

faq.question: What is the recommended replacement interval?
faq.answer: Replace when the restriction indicator reaches the maximum value, typically annually or 1,000-2,000 operating hours.

name: Parker OF5 Industrial Oil Filter
description: The Parker OF5 oil filter is designed for lubrication oil systems in industrial machinery including gearboxes, compressors, and turbines. With 20 gpm capacity and 10 micron media, it ensures clean oil circulation.
shortDescription: Industrial oil filter, 20 gpm, 10 micron, 200 psi, spin-on cartridge.
technicalDescription: Inline oil filter with spin-on canister for quick element change. 10 micron absolute media, 200 psi max working pressure, and 3 psi bypass valve. Visual/electrical indicator standard.
features: Spin-on cartridge for fast element replacement
benefits: Extends equipment life through clean lubrication
Quick element change reduces maintenance time
seoTitle: Parker OF5 Industrial Oil Filter | 20 GPM
seoDescription: Parker OF5-20 industrial oil filter, 20 gpm, 10 micron, spin-on cartridge. For gearbox, compressor, and turbine lubrication systems.

faq.question: What is the change interval?
faq.answer: Typically 6-12 months or when the clogging indicator signals, whichever comes first.

faq.question: Can synthetic oils be filtered?
faq.answer: Yes, the media is compatible with mineral and synthetic oils.

faq.question: What replacement cartridge fits?
faq.answer: Use Parker RP-20-10-M replacement element for this filter assembly.

name: Donaldson P550777 Fuel Filter/Water Separator
description: The Donaldson P550777 Fuel Pro fuel filter/water separator removes water and particulate from diesel fuel. With a 400 gph capacity and 10 micron media, it protects fuel injection systems from wear and corrosion.
shortDescription: Fuel filter/water separator, 400 gph, 10 micron, diesel fuel.
technicalDescription: Dual-stage fuel filter with integrated water separator. Primary stage removes bulk water and large particles. Secondary stage filters to 10 microns. Self-priming design with hand primer pump.
benefits: Removes water to prevent fuel system corrosion
seoTitle: Donaldson P550777 Fuel Filter / Water Separator
seoDescription: Donaldson P550777 Fuel Pro fuel filter and water separator, 400 gph, 10 micron. For diesel generators, mining, and marine engines.

faq.question: How often should water be drained?
faq.answer: Check and drain water daily in humid conditions or when the water sensor (optional) alerts.

faq.question: What is the change interval?
faq.answer: Replace filter element every 500-1,000 operating hours or annually.

faq.question: Can biodiesel be filtered?
faq.answer: Yes, this filter is compatible with B20 biodiesel blends.

name: Parker CUNO Process Water Filter 10" Big Blue
description: The Parker CUNO Big Blue is a 10-inch sediment filter housing for process water and pre-filtration applications. With a 20 gpm capacity and reusable filter element, it removes suspended solids from industrial water systems.
shortDescription: 10" Big Blue water filter housing, 20 gpm, single cartridge, 125 psi.
technicalDescription: Single-cartridge filter housing with 10-inch length, 4.5-inch diameter. Maximum 125 psi at 100°F. Includes 1-inch NPT ports, pressure relief button, and O-ring seal. Accepts standard 10-inch Big Blue cartridges.
features: Pressure relief button for safe servicing

images.alt: Parker CUNO Big Blue Water Filter

seoTitle: Parker CUNO Big Blue 10" Water Filter Housing
seoDescription: Parker CUNO Big Blue 10-inch water filter housing, 20 gpm, polypropylene, NSF certified. For process water and pre-filtration applications.

faq.question: What cartridges can be used?
faq.answer: Any standard 10" x 4.5" Big Blue cartridge including sediment, carbon block, and KDF media.

faq.question: How often should the housing be sanitized?
faq.answer: Sanitize the housing with bleach solution every time the cartridge is changed.

faq.question: Can this housing be used for hot water?
faq.answer: Maximum continuous temperature is 125°F (52°C). For hot water, use the polypropylene or metal housing variant.

name: Pall GT Series Gas Turbine Intake Air Filter
description: The Pall GT Series intake air filter provides high-efficiency filtration for gas turbine compressor inlets. This 3-stage filter system removes particulate and moisture to protect turbine blades from erosion and fouling.
shortDescription: 3-stage gas turbine intake filter, high-efficiency, moisture separation.
technicalDescription: Three-stage filtration system: pre-filter (G4), fine filter (F9), and HEPA (E12) with moisture separation. Weather hood and bird screen included. Low pressure drop design for maximum turbine efficiency.
benefits: Protects turbine blades from erosion and fouling
Maintains turbine power output with low dp

images.alt: Pall GT Gas Turbine Intake Filter

seoTitle: Pall GT Series Gas Turbine Intake Air Filter
seoDescription: Pall GT-800 3-stage gas turbine air intake filter, G4/F9/E12, moisture separation. For power generation and compressor protection.

faq.question: How often should the filter stages be replaced?
faq.answer: Pre-filter every 6 months, fine filter annually, HEPA every 2 years depending on ambient conditions.

faq.question: Does this include pulse cleaning?
faq.answer: The standard version is static. For high-dust environments, an optional reverse-pulse cleaning system is available.

faq.question: What is the maximum ambient temperature?
faq.answer: Continuous operation is rated at +80°C with standard media.
